project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: bun (npm scripts available but npm not installed; bun 1.2.14 available via mise)
test_framework: None installed - no test framework in the project
verification_instructions: 1. Run `bun run build` to confirm the Next.js build passes. 2. Run `bun run lint` for linting. 3. Verify no TypeScript errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-musicsearch 2. bun install 3. bun run build
environment_constraints: No npm available, use bun instead. bun 1.2.14 is available. No node binary directly, but bun handles all scripts. bun run build shows a warning about worker_threads.Worker 'resourceLimits' not implemented but builds successfully. OPEN_INTERNET network mode - can install packages freely.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ensure Semantic HTML for all layout sections. Follow AGENTS.md: Next.js 16 may have breaking changes from training data - check docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ if needed.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Server components are default. App uses context providers (AudioPlayerProvider, FavoritesProvider) wrapped in layout.tsx. API calls in lib/itunes.ts use fetch with next.revalidate. Types in lib/types.ts. Components in app/components/. CSS variables for theming in globals.css with @theme inline for Tailwind v4. Dark mode uses prefers-color-scheme media query. Images use next/image with remote patterns in next.config.ts. Dynamic routes use params: Promise<{...}> pattern (Next.js 16).
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - shared UI components. app/track/[id]/ - track detail page. app/favorites/ - favorites page. lib/ - utility functions (API, types, localStorage). public/ - static assets. Root has config files (next.config.ts, tsconfig.json, eslint.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs).
